docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,261.00 FILED BY NOH GLORIA AS TO DEFENDANT CHEVARRIA LILIANA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-24-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CHEVARRIA LILIANA
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $92.89 FILED BY CHEVARRIA LILIANA AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT NOH GLORIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-24-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NOH GLORIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHEVARRIA LILIANA $541.00 PRINCIPAL, $28.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $569.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT CHEVARRIA LILIANA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT NOH GLORIA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT CHEVARRIA LILIANA
